race.comment: HEIRONAUT (5) was a smart winner on debut at Sale when in the market, unable to go on with it last time at Pakenham off a short let up, racing keenly and fading late. That should've knocked the freshness out of this gelding out of G1 winner Toffee Tongue and he maps ideally up on speed. LETHAL THOUGHTS (13) continues to race very well without winning, placing in his past four. He'll be thereabouts again and worth including in all combinations. HOLLERASAUROUS (4) won narrowly on debut at Echuca and could measure up. PRINCESS MONTECITO (11) finds it hard to win but after an encouraging run last time over 1400m at Pakenham is worth thought for multiples.
